title: EsForm Item Configuration
description: Configuration for a single form field in es-plus-ui EsForm component

prop.description: Field name bound to the form model. Supports nested paths like 'a.b' or 'a[0].b'

label.description: Display label for the form field

formtype.description: Input component type. Maps to the corresponding Element Plus component

attrs.description: Attributes passed through to the underlying Element Plus component (e.g., placeholder, clearable, type, multiple)

on.description: Event listeners passed to the component (e.g., change, input, blur)

dataOptions.description: Options data for Select, Radio, Checkbox, Cascader components

width.description: Field width (number for px, string for CSS value)

isHidden.description: Function (model, item, formProps) => boolean. Returns true to hide the field conditionally

render.description: Custom render function (h, model, ctx) => VNode. Used when formtype is not set

apiParams.description: Configuration for loading options from an API endpoint

isInitRun.description: Whether to auto-load API data on component initialization

callOptionListFormat.description: Function (data) => Array<{label, value}>. Transforms API response to dataOptions format

httpRequest.description: Custom HTTP request function override for this field. Signature: (params) => Promise

listenToCallBack.description: Callback mapping. Use 'crtn' key for option format conversion

crtn.description: Function to convert API response to [{label, value}] format

formItemOptions.description: Additional props passed to el-form-item (e.g., rules, labelWidth, required)

rules.description: Validation rules for this field (Element Plus format)

labelWidth.description: Override label width for this field

components.description: Custom component mapping for this field
